title: GUÍA PARA LOS GANADEROS AVÍCOLAS CON RECOMENDACIONES SOBRE COMO IMPLEMENTAR LOS REGLAMENTOS SOBRE BIOSEGURIDAD EN SUS PROPIAS GRANJAS
description: A practical guide for poultry farmers to implement biosecurity regulations on their own farms, developed by the University of Veterinary Medicine of Budapest. It outlines essential biosecurity elements, barrier hygiene practices, prudent antimicrobial use, and offers recommendations for improvements.
